name: Red Mountain Mining Limited
summary: Red Mountain Mining Limited primarily explores for gold properties in Australia and base metals in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It holds interests in the Mt Maitland Gold project covering an area of approximately 62 square kilometers located in Murchison Goldfields in Western Australia; the Batangas Gold project situated in the Philippines; and the Mukabe-Kasari cobalt-copper project located in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Red Mountain Mining Limited was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in West Perth, Australia.
